Computer-Assisted Reporting Newsletter, 1990–2007

Science stories and CAR

Gwen Carleton NICAR Staff October 1994
Data & DatabasesJournalism & Newsroom

The article illustrates how science journalists are leveraging computer data to enhance stories, featuring examples such as the investigation into toxic chemical releases in California’s Central Valley.

Everyone's heard about the computer-assisted story that rocked city hall. But what if you prefer physics to politics?... For journalists interested in the big picture, the results can be significant.
